skills.name: send-slack-message
skills.description: Send a message to a Slack channel via the Slack MCP server.
skills.prompt: Use the Slack MCP server to send the following message to the specified channel. Ask the user for the channel name and message if not provided.

skills.name: check-gmail
skills.description: Check recent Gmail messages and summarize them.
skills.prompt: Use the Gmail MCP server to retrieve the most recent unread emails and provide a concise summary of each, including sender, subject, and key points.

skills.name: send-email
skills.description: Draft and send an email via Gmail using the Gmail MCP server.
skills.prompt: Use the Gmail MCP server to compose and send an email. Ask the user for the recipient, subject, and body if not already provided.

skills.name: summarize-session
skills.prompt: Please provide a concise bullet-point summary of what we have worked on in this session, including any decisions made, code written, and next steps.
